feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Eberhard Karls University of Tübingen
entry.content:
Authors: NB Thapa

Abstract: ... One reason we want to study exomoons is that they might help make planets suitable, for life . ... It tells us that we should look at Super - Earth where the stars gravity is not too strong. This ... This way of doing things is good enough to find ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: (~biosignature|life|alien|organic) (Mars|Venus ... (keyword alert)

entry.title: Mathematics Is Learning: Professional Development for High School Teachers to Reimagine Teaching
entry.content:
Authors: JL Bean- 2026

Abstract: Many high school students experience mathematics as disconnected, procedural, and intellectually disengaging. Despite decades of reform, national assessment data confirm persistent underachievement and a lack of meaningful mathematical ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.title: Prebiotics/synbiotics as natural alternatives for brain development and aging–focus on nutrigenomic and direct effects: a systematic review

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: LVP Gonçalves, PFG Holanda, AVS Cabral... - Nutritional Neuroscience, 2026

Abstract: Objectives This review highlights the importance of prebiotics and their combination with probiotics as essential nutrients for brain development and as potential therapeutic alternatives for neurodegenerative diseases. It further highlights the ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, brain

entry.title: The RNA-First Fallacy: Conflating Evolutionary Ancestry with Prebiotic Primacy

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: A Kahana

Journal: 2026

Abstract: The RNA World hypothesis remains the most widely accepted framework in origins - of - life research, anchored in compelling biochemical evidence for RNA's deep evolutionary ancestry. However, this viewpoint routinely extends beyond that and is ...

entry.title: From Physical Difference to Meaning: A Constructor-Theoretic Framework for Prebiotic Information in Casimir-Lifshitz-Coupled Protocell Clusters

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: M Massoth - arXiv preprint arXiv:2604.20885, 2026

Abstract: This paper develops a physical framework for the prebiotic emergence of information and meaning. Building on Constructor Theory, we define information as a reproducible physical difference and meaning as a difference with stable ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, brain

entry.title: Early Microbial Life: Our Past, Present, and Future Project Report
entry.content:
Authors: V Sperandio, KC Carroll, S Crosson...

Abstract: Life on Earth has evolved over the past 4 billion years, from simple, non-living chemical compounds to early unicellular life, culminating in the vast diversity of unicellular and multicellular organisms seen today. Understanding this extraordinary ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Toward Inferring the Surface Fluxes of Biosignature Gases on Rocky Exoplanets from Telescope Spectra
entry.content:
Authors: NF Wogan, NE Batalha, J Krissansen-Totton, K Zahnle... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: The James Webb Space Telescope and the future Habitable Worlds Observatory aim to discover exoplanet atmospheric spectra that detect life. Currently, most existing spectral" retrieval" algorithms focus on inferring the abundances of biogenic gases ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.title: Postapproval Study for Brain-Responsive Neurostimulation for Drug-Resistant Focal Epilepsy: Three-Year Efficacy and Interim Safety Results
entry.content:

Abstract: Background and Objectives Neuromodulation therapies are approved for the treatment of focal epilepsy based on data from randomized controlled trials (RCTs). After approval of a responsive direct brain stimulation device (The RNS System for ...

Tags: brain

Alert: Edward F Chang (author alert)

entry.title: Metaphors we learn to sign by: Positive transfer effects of existing sign language expertise and gestural repertoire on metaphor inferencing in a novel sign language
entry.content:
Authors: J Hofweber, L Aumônier, T Latham, K Trice, Z Qi - Brain and Language, 2026

Abstract: Our study investigated metaphor inferencing in second languages (L2). According to universalist accounts, L2 metaphor comprehension should be intuitive. However, cross-linguistic differences suggest that successful metaphor inferencing is subject to ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

Alert: Zhenghan QI (author alert)

entry.title: Was die Semantik aus Gullivers Reisen lernen kann
entry.content:
Authors: E Onea

Abstract: In diesem Aufsatz schlage ich eine empirische Methode zur Untersuchung realer oder vermuteter semantischer Grenzfälle vor. Sie eignet sich besonders zur Untersuchung der Bedeutung solcher Wörter, die in aktuellen ...
